# Society & Economics

Articles covering social trends and economic developments of 2010.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [Affordable Care Act](affordable-care-act.md) | Signed by President Obama on March 23, the ACA was the most sweeping overhaul of US healthcare since Medicare and Medicaid, reducing the uninsured rate from 16% to 8.9% by 2016. |
| [Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act](dodd-frank-act.md) | Signed July 21, the most comprehensive US financial regulation overhaul since the 1930s, creating the CFPB and FSOC, the Volcker Rule, and a derivatives framework in response to the 2008 crisis. |
| [European Sovereign Debt Crisis and the First Greek Bailout](european-sovereign-debt-crisis.md) | Greece accepted a €110 billion EU–IMF bailout on May 2 and the eurozone built a €750 billion backstop on May 9–10, opening the acute phase of a crisis that exposed the euro's structural fragility. |
| [Global Unemployment and Economic Recovery of 2010](global-unemployment-and-economic-recovery-2010.md) | Output rebounded from the 2008–09 crisis but unemployment stayed high (US 9.6%, eurozone 10.1%, ILO ~205 million jobless), defining a "jobless recovery" that fueled political polarization through the decade. |
| [Shanghai Expo 2010](shanghai-expo-2010.md) | China hosted its first World's Fair from May to October under the theme "Better City, Better Life," drawing a record 73.08 million visits and cementing Shanghai's status as a global economic hub. |
| [2010 United States Census](2010-us-census.md) | The April 1 decennial count recorded 308,745,538 residents (9.7% growth since 2000), shifting congressional representation toward the South and West and documenting a rapidly diversifying, majority-minority-trending population. |
| [Twitter and Social Media Growth in 2010](twitter-social-media-growth-2010.md) | Twitter scaled to roughly 90 million tweets per day and about 145 million registered users in 2010, emerging as real-time news infrastructure and launching its Promoted Tweets advertising model. |

<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
